description: Complete a document-grounded extraction and verification task from the imported context. Source candidate intent: Generates structured peer review feedback for biology research documents following the required sections: Scope and Assumptions, Major Issues, Minor Issues, Actionable Edits, Biology Relevance, Summary.. The Skill returns a structured answer, extracted steps, evidence, and verifier notes; it does not perform self-play training, clone repositories, install packages, download datasets, or mutate local files by itself.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template:
You are a peer review expert for a biology author. Evaluate the document for clarity, flow, coherence, and validity. Provide structured feedback with sections: Scope and Assumptions; Major Issues; Minor Issues; Actionable Edits; Biology Relevance; Summary.

Document: {document_text}

document_text.description: The biology research document to review.

postconditions: Feedback follows the required section order and is constructive.
preconditions: Input document is a biology research text.

name: document_grounded_extractor_document_ctx2skill_context_03

challenges.expected_evidence: A JSON object with keys: scope_and_assumptions, major_issues, minor_issues, actionable_edits, biology_relevance, summary, each containing relevant text.
challenges.failure_signal: Missing any required section, sections out of order, feedback not constructive, or no actionable edits.
rubric: Covers all six sections in order
challenges.task: Given a biology research document, generate a structured peer review following the required sections.

challenges.expected_evidence: A list of errors found and a corrected outline of the sections in the proper order.
challenges.failure_signal: Fails to identify missing sections or order errors, or provides incorrect corrections.
challenges.task: Given a partial peer review with missing sections or incorrect order, identify the errors and correct them.

constraints: Must be for a biology background author.
Sections must be in the specified order.
facts: The agent is a peer review expert for biology background authors.
Feedback must be rigorous and constructive to improve publication readiness.
Required sections in order: Scope and Assumptions; Major Issues; Minor Issues; Actionable Edits; Biology Relevance; Summary.
Baseline extracted actions: evaluate a biology research document for clarity, flow, coherence, validity; provide structured peer review feedback with those sections.
procedures: Evaluate document for clarity, flow, coherence, and validity.
Structure feedback into the six specified sections.
context_pack.summary: System prompt for a peer review expert providing rigorous, constructive feedback on biology research documents, with required sections in a specific order.

ctx2skill_evidence.demo_scope: P0/P1 demo-paper implementation; not full long-horizon self-play training.

judge_results.rationale: Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.
Ctx2Skill-lite replay score meets the demo threshold.

ctx2skill_evidence.paper_method: Ctx2Skill-lite: challenger -> reasoner/judge -> proposer -> cross-time replay
